properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God I'm running for your heart, I'm running for your heart 'Till I am a soul on fire Lord, I'm longing for your ways I'm waiting for the day When I'm a soul on fire 'Till I am a soul on fire!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord restore the joy I had I have wandered, bring me back In this darkness, lead me through Until all I see is you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord let me burn for you again Le me return to you again And Lord, let me me burn for you again And let me return to you again

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God, I'm running for Your heart I'm running for Your heart Till I am a soul on fire I wanna be Till I am a soul on fire Till I am a soul on fire
